title: Polling Preparations Intensify in Dharmapuri
summary: The Dharmapuri district administration has significantly intensified preparations for the upcoming polling day, ensuring that all logistical, technical, and security arrangements are fully in place. Polling booths across rural and urban areas have been equipped with EVMs, VVPAT machines, drinking water facilities, shaded waiting areas, and accessibility features for elderly and differently-abled voters. Officials conducted multiple inspections and coordination meetings with various departments to ensure seamless execution. Special attention has been given to remote villages to ensure maximum voter participation and accessibility.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Cash Monitoring
summary: Election flying squads and surveillance teams have stepped up monitoring across Dharmapuri to prevent illegal cash distribution and voter inducement. Intensive vehicle checks were conducted at highways, border areas, and interior roads. Several cases of unaccounted cash seizure were reported, and investigations have been initiated. Officials warned that strict legal action will be taken against those violating election norms.

title: Campaigning Ends with Strong Local Messaging
summary: Political parties concluded their election campaigns with rallies and outreach programs across Dharmapuri. Candidates focused on local issues such as water scarcity, agriculture, employment, and infrastructure. The final day witnessed active participation from voters, with leaders making last-minute appeals before the silence period came into effect.

title: Security Tightened in Sensitive Zones
summary: Police and central forces have been deployed in sensitive areas across Dharmapuri to maintain law and order. Checkposts have been strengthened, and surveillance has been increased through patrols and monitoring systems. Authorities have set up control rooms to handle emergencies and ensure a peaceful polling process.

title: Transport Arrangements Strengthened for Polling
summary: Special buses and vehicles have been arranged to transport polling officials, security personnel, and election materials across Dharmapuri district. Authorities ensured timely movement, especially to remote villages, to avoid any delays in polling operations.

title: Medical Teams Deployed for Polling Day
summary: Healthcare teams, ambulances, and emergency units have been stationed near polling booths to handle medical emergencies, particularly heat-related illnesses. Authorities advised voters to stay hydrated and take precautions while voting.

title: Rising Heat Affects Daily Activities
summary: Dharmapuri continues to experience high temperatures, affecting daily routines and election preparations. Officials advised voters to cast their votes during early morning or evening hours to avoid heat exposure.

title: Awareness Drives Encourage Voting
summary: Authorities and volunteers conducted awareness campaigns across villages to educate voters about the importance of participation in the democratic process.

title: Mock Polls Ensure Machine Readiness
summary: Election officials conducted mock polls to test the functioning of EVMs and VVPAT units. The process ensured readiness and transparency before polling day.

title: Illegal Liquor Seized in Raids
summary: Police seized illegal liquor during raids conducted in rural areas to prevent distribution during elections. Cases have been registered against offenders.

title: Night Patrols Intensified
summary: Police increased night patrols across rural and urban areas to maintain law and order before polling day.

title: Farmers Continue Irrigation Activities
summary: Farmers in Dharmapuri continued irrigation and crop maintenance despite election-related activities, ensuring stable agricultural output.

title: Village Roads Cleaned and Repaired
summary: Local bodies undertook cleaning and minor repair works on roads leading to polling booths to ensure smooth access.

title: Weekly Markets See Reduced Activity
summary: Weekly markets experienced lower footfall as residents focused on election preparations.

title: Emergency Services on High Alert
summary: Emergency response teams were deployed across the district to handle any incidents during polling.

title: Schools Closed for Polling
summary: Schools were declared holidays as they are being used as polling stations, affecting regular academic schedules.

title: Essential Goods Demand Increases
summary: Residents stocked up on groceries and essentials ahead of polling day.

title: Air Quality Remains Within Limits
summary: Air quality levels remained stable across the district despite increased activity.
